segments.text: Make a joyful shout to God, all the earth!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Sing out the honor of His name; Make His praise glorious.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Say to God, 'How awesome are Your works! Through the greatness of Your power Your enemies shall submit themselves to You.'
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: All the earth shall worship You And sing praises to You; They shall sing praises to Your name.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Come and see the works of God; He is awesome in His doing toward the sons of men.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: He turned the sea into dry land; They went through the river on foot. There we will rejoice in Him.
He rules by His power forever; His eyes observe the nations; Do not let the rebellious exalt themselves.
Oh, bless our God, you peoples! And make the voice of His praise to be heard,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Who keeps our soul among the living, And does not allow our feet to be moved.
For You, O God, have tested us; You have refined us as silver is refined.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: You brought us into the net; You laid affliction on our backs.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: You have caused men to ride over our heads; We went through fire and through water; But You brought us out to rich fulfillment.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will go into Your house with burnt offerings; I will pay You my vows,
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Which my lips have uttered And my mouth has spoken when I was in trouble.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I will offer You burnt sacrifices of fat animals, With the sweet aroma of rams; I will offer bulls with goats.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Come and hear, all you who fear God, And I will declare what He has done for my soul.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: I cried to Him with my mouth, And He was extolled with my tongue.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: If I regard iniquity in my heart, The Lord will not hear.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: But certainly God has heard me; He has attended to the voice of my prayer.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Blessed be God, Who has not turned away my prayer, Nor His mercy from me!
segments.speaker: Psalmist
